scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,COMMUNITY" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run community"
scripts.launch: npm run prisma:generate && npm run dev
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd community-frontend && npm install
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start" "cd community-frontend && npm start"
